# Documentation

[https://hackage.haskell.org/package/gi-dbusmenu-0.4.14/docs/GI-Dbusmenu.html](https://hackage.haskell.org/package/gi-dbusmenu-0.4.14/docs/GI-Dbusmenu.html)
